Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 33 

DA_RUN_ID 

LABEL: TAF Production Run Identifier (unique for each TAF run) 

DESCRIPTION: A unique identifier that identifies the TAF production run that produced the TAF file. 

SHORT NAME: DA_RUN_ID 

LONG NAME: DA_RUN_ID 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: XXXX 

COMMENT: Higher
